definition: CMP_MAP gradient climbs a bitmask-and or numeric-threshold comparison that I2S substitution structurally cannot handle (no multi-byte magic constant to substitute), giving VP a monotone fitness signal where I2S is uninformative.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP distance feedback rewards each upward step of the 1-byte bit_depth field toward threshold 16, giving a monotone gradient that cmplog's unanchored I2S substitution lacks.
signature.one_line: VP gradient walks 1-byte bit_depth field up to threshold 16

analysis.summary_one_line: PNG IHDR bit_depth byte at file offset 0x18 must be >=16 (i.e. 0x10) to take the false side of the < 16 gate

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The byte at PNG file offset 0x18 (the IHDR bit_depth field) must be >= 16, with 0x10 (decimal 16) being the canonical winning value. The byte must reach pngset.c via a parsed IHDR chunk so info_ptr->bit_depth carries that value at the tRNS-handling site.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 trials and the one winner-resolving seed carries 0x10 at offset 0x18 — exactly the threshold value 16 that flips `info_ptr->bit_depth < 16` to false. CMP_MAP/value-profile feedback rewards inputs whose bit_depth field byte moves toward 16 along the 1-byte CMP gradient, so vpc gets a continuous signal during the climb from typical values (0x01/0x08) to 0x10.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog resolves only 1/10 trials and blocks 9/10. Its loser seeds carry 0x08 or 0x01 at offset 0x18, both <16. cmplog has I2S but lacks the CMP_MAP gradient: I2SRandReplace can record CMP(bit_depth, 16) and try byte substitution, but with 8-bit operands the I2S substitution offset is essentially random across the input — without the value-profile distance reward there is no monotone signal to anchor the substitution at offset 0x18 specifically, so resolution depends on luck.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The technique delta between value_profile_cmplog and cmplog is value_profile, i.e. the CMP_MAP gradient. For the 1-byte comparison `info_ptr->bit_depth < 16` the CMP_MAP records the Hamming/distance between the runtime operand and the constant 16, giving vpc a smooth gradient signal that selects intermediate seeds whose bit_depth byte is closer to 16; this reliably converges to 0x10. cmplog has no such gradient — its I2S substitution is unguided about which offset to overwrite, which explains the 10/10 vs 1/10 split.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair at this branch is value_profile_cmplog>cmplog with delta=value_profile.
value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 trials while cmplog blocks 9/10.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=1/10  blocked=9  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker compares the parsed bit_depth field against the literal 16.
The winner takes the false side of the comparison.
At file offset 0x18 the winner byte is 0x10 (=16) and the loser bytes are 0x08 (9 of 10) or 0x01 (1 of 10).
The winner-resolving seed begins with the canonical PNG signature followed by an IHDR chunk header, so byte 0x18 lies inside the IHDR payload where bit_depth resides.
cmplog's mutator stack is naive's havoc/token plus I2SRandReplace, which substitutes one CMP operand for the other at byte sequences matching the recorded operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
naive's havoc + token stack **plus** `I2SRandReplace`.
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient bucket feedback on top of cmplog's I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
**Instrumentation**: union of cmplog and value_profile — edge counters,
per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog's feedback adds CMP_MAP buckets that cmplog does not have.
The duration-blocked gap is enormous (vpc averages 0.05h vs cmplog 11.35h), consistent with vpc's gradient reaching the threshold quickly while cmplog spins.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness exposing a 1-byte CMP `x < K` where K is a literal and x is derived from one parsed input byte, run with cmplog vs value_profile_cmplog at multiple K values, where cmplog matches or exceeds vpc's resolution rate at all K. That would mean CMP_MAP gradient is NOT the differentiator and the win must come from something else.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Only one winner-resolving seed is available, so the claim that 0x10 is the canonical winning byte at offset 0x18 (vs other values >=16 like 0x18, 0x20, 0xff) rests on a single observation; cmplog's I2S could in principle pick any operand-matching offset for substitution, and the structural mapping (offset 0x18 = bit_depth) is inferred from the PNG IHDR layout rather than from libpng parsing code shown in the prompt.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient distinguishes the bitwise-AND result against 0x02 bit, rewarding inputs that flip the color_type bitmask bit toward zero; cmplog's I2S cannot treat a 1-bit mask as a substitutable magic constant.
signature.one_line: VP gradient flips color_type bitmask bit 0x02 toward zero

analysis.summary_one_line: PNG IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 must have bit 0x02 (PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR) cleared, i.e. a grayscale color_type

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The PNG IHDR color_type byte (file offset 0x19) must not carry bit 0x02 (PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR). Concretely color_type in {0, 3, 4}; the winner-resolving seeds use 0x00 (grayscale), while loser-blocking seeds use 0x06 (RGB+alpha). Correlated IHDR fields at 0x13 (width LSB), 0x18 (bit_depth), and 0x1c (interlace) must also remain self-consistent so the chunk reaches the gate.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds put 0x00 at offset 0x19 (grayscale color_type). The expression (color_type & 0x02) then evaluates to 0, so the gate at L1216 takes the false (winning) branch reaching the else arm at L1224-L1230.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds put 0x06 at offset 0x19 (RGB+alpha color_type). (0x06 & 0x02) = 0x02 != 0, so the gate at L1216 takes the true (blocked) branch into L1217-L1222. All 10 loser-blocking seeds have 0x06 at this offset; only color_type values lacking the 0x02 bit clear the gate.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards inputs that come closer to satisfying integer comparisons. The bitwise-AND-with-literal gate at L1216 emits a trace_cmp with one operand being (color_type & 0x02) and the other being 0; CMP_MAP-bucket feedback distinguishes color_type=0x06 (bit set) from color_type=0x00 (bit clear), so inputs flipping the 0x02 bit toward zero are preserved as corpus. naive and cmplog lack this gradient: naive has only edge feedback, and cmplog's input-to-state substitution mutator cannot meaningfully substitute a 1-bit bitmask literal as if it were a multi-byte magic constant. cmplog therefore performs no better than naive here (both are losers; pair shape BBRR), while value_profile_cmplog inherits the CMP_MAP gradient and resolves at the same rate as value_profile.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs at this branch carry the value_profile technique delta, not I2S.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog > cmplog with the same value_profile delta.
The blocker source line is a bitwise-AND test of png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR.
The globally blocked side is the false branch, so the winning side is the false arm (else branch at L1224).
Winner-resolving seeds carry 0x00 at file offset 0x19 while loser-blocking seeds carry 0x06.
Per-role coverage confirms the winner set took the L1224 else arm and the loser set took the L1217 true arm.
The W-only else arm at L1224 sets sig_bit.gray, consistent with grayscale color_type taking the false branch.
DIVERGENT BRANCHES at the blocker line confirm W took F (10 times across the seed pool) while L took T.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1216  T=0 F=2  T=10 F=0  if ((png_ptr->color_type & PNG_COLOR_MASK_COLOR) != 0)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile installs CMP_MAP gradient buckets on integer CMPs so inputs whose operands move closer to matching are preserved.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket)

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves an input that brings a CMP-operand pair closer to matching than previously seen.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog's mutator addition is I2SRandReplace, which substitutes captured CMP operands at matching byte sequences in the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive provides no I2S substitution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a single `if ((input[OFF] & 0x02) != 0) <blocker>` gate (no other constraints), swept across fuzzers, in which cmplog matches value_profile's resolution probability — that would refute the claim that the 1-bit bitmask gate is specifically a CMP_MAP-gradient feature and not just a generic easy-to-flip byte.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Whether the >=8/10 vp resolution truly comes from CMP_MAP gradient on the bitmask CMP at L1216 itself versus from CMP_MAP gradient on upstream PNG-chunk size/CRC gates (e.g. L1194 length check, png_crc_finish at L1204) that vp clears more reliably, with the L1216 outcome being a downstream byproduct of which chunks vp manages to reach.
